payload.author: claude
payload.body: EPIC DONE (committed fe1dc16). Projects are repo-anchored: born only from attaching a local .scope or connecting a local workspace to a hub; hosted UI never creates. Board follows the repo via the committed remote.json pointer + hub even when the event log isn't committed. Verified vs real Postgres (local-client-pg) + web non-PG 348/348. Full-suite x2 with PG is the final gate (in flight).
